title: Prompt and Context Budget Efficiency
notes: Generated Skill-1 live-provider plan TEST-RUN-2026-05-21-033 remains archived and runner-valid.
Coverage validates prompt-cache segmentation, memory budget selection, privacy gates, output discipline, weather location clarity and cached-token evidence without live provider spend.
All checks inspect deterministic local routing, cache, memory-budget and privacy-gate code only.

tests.name: Simple greeting avoids tools and keeps only stable base prompt cacheable.

expected.assertion: Simple greeting avoids tools and keeps only stable base prompt cacheable.

tests.name: Clear Koeln weather prompt has usable location and no cost-driven clarification need.

expected.assertion: Clear Koeln weather prompt has usable location and no cost-driven clarification need.

tests.name: Relevant synthetic preference fits budget while unrelated large context is excluded.

expected.assertion: Relevant synthetic preference fits budget while unrelated large context is excluded.

tests.name: Neutral factual question does not emit private memory coupons.

expected.assertion: Neutral factual question does not emit private memory coupons.

tests.name: Repeated stable segments produce cache-hit and estimated-token-saved evidence.

expected.assertion: Repeated stable segments produce cache-hit and estimated-token-saved evidence.

tests.name: Verbosity directive keeps normal answers concise and is injected once.

expected.assertion: Verbosity directive keeps normal answers concise and is injected once.

tests.name: Oversized synthetic context is skipped while smaller relevant slots remain selected.

expected.assertion: Oversized synthetic context is skipped while smaller relevant slots remain selected.

tests.name: Bulk memory prompt is blocked before context injection.

expected.assertion: Bulk memory prompt is blocked before context injection.

tests.name: Broad private-context externalization is blocked; scoped safe personalization remains allowed.

expected.assertion: Broad private-context externalization is blocked; scoped safe personalization remains allowed.

tests.name: Cache evidence contains counts/hashes/lengths but no raw private synthetic secret.

expected.assertion: Cache evidence contains counts/hashes/lengths but no raw private synthetic secret.

tests.name: Prompt injection cannot force all-memory dump into prompt/answer.

expected.assertion: Prompt injection cannot force all-memory dump into prompt/answer.

tests.name: Token-budget bypass instruction still records bounded/cache decision evidence.

expected.assertion: Token-budget bypass instruction still records bounded/cache decision evidence.
